zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd ap Einion於1285年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素 凱爾尼時，他的父親Einion Ednyfed35歲，母親Angharad ferch Ieuaf15歲。他和Gwenllian ferch Dafydd至少有8個兒子和3個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’. See Eynon and compare Bennion . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Eynon
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd ap Einion was born in 1285, in Castle Caereinion, Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Einion Ednyfed, was 35 and his mother, Angharad ferch Ieuaf, was 15. He had at least 8 sons and 3 daughters with Gwenllian ferch Dafydd.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dafydd ap Einion est né en 1285, à Castle Caereinion, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Einion Ednyfed, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Ieuaf, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles avec Gwenllian ferch Dafydd.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dafydd ap Einion 1285 in Castle Caereinion, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Einion Ednyfed 35 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Ieuaf 15. Er hatte mit Gwenllian ferch Dafydd mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd ap Einion è nato il nel 1285 nel Castle Caereinion, Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Einion Ednyfed, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Ieuaf, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie con Gwenllian ferch Dafydd.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Einionが1285年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストル ケエレイニオンで生まれた時，父Einion Ednyfedは35歳，母Angharad ferch Ieuafは15歳であった。彼はGwenllian ferch Dafyddとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Einion(이)가 1285년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀 카이르인이언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Einion Ednyfed(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Ieuaf(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Gwenllian ferch Dafydd(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd ap Einion родился в 1285 г. в местности кастл каиринион, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Einion Ednyfed было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Ieuaf, 15. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери от Gwenllian ferch Dafydd.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dafydd ap Einion nació en 1285, en Castle Caereinion, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Einion Ednyfed, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Ieuaf, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas con Gwenllian ferch Dafydd.
